name: koperasi-berjalan-tests
description: Comprehensive system testing for Koperasi Berjalan application

scripts.test:auth: node -e "const t = require('./puppeteer-comprehensive-test.js'); const tester = new t(); tester.runTestSuite('authentication').catch(console.error);"
scripts.test:dashboard: node -e "const t = require('./puppeteer-comprehensive-test.js'); const tester = new t(); tester.runTestSuite('dashboard').catch(console.error);"
scripts.test:mobile: node -e "const t = require('./puppeteer-comprehensive-test.js'); const tester = new t(); tester.runTestSuite('mobile-responsiveness').catch(console.error);"
scripts.test:pwa: node -e "const t = require('./puppeteer-comprehensive-test.js'); const tester = new t(); tester.runTestSuite('pwa-features').catch(console.error);"
scripts.test:performance: node -e "const t = require('./puppeteer-comprehensive-test.js'); const tester = new t(); tester.runTestSuite('performance').catch(console.error);"

author: Koperasi Berjalan Development Team
